ddls:
CREATE TABLE "development_boards" (
  "board_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each development board */,
  "board_name" TEXT /* Name of the development board */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the development board */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the development board */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the development board */,
  "supported_jtag_signals" TEXT /* Supported JTAG signals for the development board */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("board_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jtag_signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each JTAG signal standard */,
  "signal_name" TEXT /* Name of the JTAG signal standard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the JTAG signal standard */,
  "signal_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the JTAG signal */,
  "signal_standard" TEXT /* Standard of the JTAG signal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pins" (
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pin */,
  "board_id" INTEGER /* ID of the development board the pin belongs to */,
  "pin_name" TEXT /* Name of the pin */,
  "pin_number" INTEGER /* Number of the pin */,
  "pin_type" TEXT /* Type of the pin */,
  "pin_description" TEXT /* Description of the pin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pins_board_id FOREIGN KEY ("board_id") REFERENCES development_boards ("board_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pin_mappings" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pin mapping */,
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pin being mapped */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the JTAG signal being mapped to */,
  "signal_name" TEXT /* Name of the JTAG signal being mapped to */,
  "mapping_description" TEXT /* Description of the pin mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_mappings_pin_id FOREIGN KEY ("pin_id") REFERENCES pins ("pin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_mappings_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES jtag_signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "board_id" INTEGER /* ID of the development board the document belongs to */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of document */,
  "doc_file" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "doc_version" INTEGER /* Version of the document */,
  "doc_format" TEXT /* Format of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documentation_board_id FOREIGN KEY ("board_id") REFERENCES development_boards ("board_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "board_id" INTEGER /* ID of the development board the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the development board configuration */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Author of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_board_id FOREIGN KEY ("board_id") REFERENCES development_boards ("board_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "debugging_tools" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each debugging tool */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the debugging tool */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the debugging tool */,
  "tool_version" INTEGER /* Version of the debugging tool */,
  "tool_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the debugging tool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "debugging_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each debugging log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the log */,
  "board_id" INTEGER /* ID of the development board the log belongs to */,
  "log_file" TEXT /* File path to the debugging log */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the log was uploaded */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the debugging log */,
  "log_size" INTEGER /* Size of the debugging log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_debugging_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_debugging_logs_board_id FOREIGN KEY ("board_id") REFERENCES development_boards ("board_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workflows" (
  "workflow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workflow */,
  "workflow_name" TEXT /* Name of the workflow */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the workflow */,
  "workflow_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the workflow */,
  "workflow_status" TEXT /* Status of the workflow */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workflow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workflow_steps" (
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workflow step */,
  "workflow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workflow the step belongs to */,
  "step_name" TEXT /* Name of the workflow step */,
  "step_description" TEXT /* Description of the workflow step */,
  "step_status" TEXT /* Status of the workflow step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workflow_steps_workflow_id FOREIGN KEY ("workflow_id") REFERENCES workflows ("workflow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the development board or debugging log */,
  "board_id" INTEGER /* ID of the development board being accessed */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the debugging log being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the development board or debugging log was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user who accessed the development board or debugging log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_board_id FOREIGN KEY ("board_id") REFERENCES development_boards ("board_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES debugging_logs ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
